title: User Research Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger user research foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: User Research Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: User Research Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good user research foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
User Research Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
